codex_response:
Implemented `aa62e3f4` as “erase the figure and redraw its 4-neighbor exterior border in the rarest non-background color.” I used the Opus hint and discarded the Sonnet hint because the Sonnet “mirror-symmetric outline” claim does not match the official examples; that correction is recorded in [arc2/tasks/task_aa62e3f4/notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aa62e3f4/notes.md). No new reusable primitive was needed.

The verifier is in [arc2/tasks/task_aa62e3f4/verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aa62e3f4/verifier.py#L1), the generator in [arc2/tasks/task_aa62e3f4/generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aa62e3f4/generator.py#L1), and the package wiring in [arc2/tasks/task_aa62e3f4/__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aa62e3f4/__init__.py#L1). The generator builds single compact connected blobs with `8` kept as the dominant background and a rare embedded marker color, which matches the official family better than generic polyomino noise.
